text:
At the Krusty Krab, SpongeBob is sniffing a Krabby Patty, then squirts a mustard "checkmark" on the patty and puts on the bun. Just then, SpongeBob hears Pearl come in crying. SpongeBob gets a pan and puts it on top of his head for protection from the tears


"Don't cry, love. Daddy's going to make it all right. Calm down, girl!"


A wave of water from the tears busts the door down, but SpongeBob pushes the door back up for a couple seconds, then the water comes breaking through the door and wipes out all the customers, dropping them to the floor. SpongeBob walks up to Mr. Krabs with part of a table around his face

text:
Con Man: I was born with glass bones and paper skin. Every morning, I break my legs, and every afternoon, I break my arms.
[Cut to SpongeBob and Patrick, they both have faces meaning that they were about to cry]
Con Man: At night, [A tear runs down SpongeBob's cheek] I lay awake in agony until my heart attacks put me to sleep.
[Cut to the Con Man, the wires snap]
Con Man: [About to fall] Oh, no...
[A glass breaking sound is heard while the customer grunts while hitting the steps]
Con Man: [On the last step] Ow...
